Global Messages

Your OS inbox

Messages is your personal inbox across CSorro. People can contact you here even if they are not in one of your workspaces.

Open Project Chat

Inbox

📥
All messagesDMs and requests
7
🧑‍💼
RequestsPeople outside your workspaces
2
🏢
Workspace updatesCompany announcements
3
📂
Project mentionsLinked to project work
4
⭐
StarredImportant conversations
1

Conversation

Select a message

How messages work

Global DMAnyone can message you here if your profile allows it.
Workspace chatCompany/team announcements and channels.
Project chatWork discussions tied to one project.
Private roomsSelected project members only. Others cannot see the room exists.
Rule

Personal contact goes to Messages. Work about a project stays inside that project.
